title: Cobblemon Rebalanced
description: Giving pokémon in need some much deserved upgrades.
body:
The goal of Cobblemon Rebalanced is to give pokémon that are lacking viability some much needed upgrades so the player can focus on having their favorite pocket monsters instead of "the most viable".

*Features*
- Ability changes
- Base stat buffs
- Move pool changes
- New Types


(Documentation of all changes can be found under links)
